content.text:
Now I can see the issue. In the `isBetweenClassAndPrimaryConstructor` function on line 65, the code accesses `this.treeNext.elementType` without checking if `this.treeNext` is null. When the file ends with blank lines after a class declaration, `treeNext` can be null, causing the NPE.

Let me look at the test file to understand the testing patterns:

content.text:
Now I understand the issue clearly. The problem is in the `isBetweenClassAndPrimaryConstructor` function at line 65:

```kotlin
this.treeNext.elementType == PRIMARY_CONSTRUCTOR
```

When the file ends with blank lines after a class declaration without a body, `this.treeNext` can be null (since there's nothing after the whitespace at the end of file), causing the NPE.

The fix is simple - we need to add a null-safe check before accessing `elementType` on `treeNext`.

Let me fix the issue:

        prevCodeLeaf()
            ?.let { prevNode ->
                prevNode.elementType == IDENTIFIER &&
                    prevNode.treeParent.elementType == CLASS &&
                    this.treeNext.elementType == PRIMARY_CONSTRUCTOR
            }
            ?: false", "new_string": "    private fun ASTNode.isBetweenClassAndPrimaryConstructor() =
        prevCodeLeaf()
            ?.let { prevNode ->
                prevNode.elementType == IDENTIFIER &&
                    prevNode.treeParent.elementType == CLASS &&
                    this.treeNext?.elementType == PRIMARY_CONSTRUCTOR
            }
            ?: false"}

class NoConsecutiveBlankLinesRuleNpeFixTest {
    private val noConsecutiveBlankLinesRuleAssertThat = assertThatRule { NoConsecutiveBlankLinesRule() }

    @Test
    fun `Given sealed class without body and consecutive blank lines at end of file then do return lint error`() {
        val code =
            """
            sealed class Hello



            """.trimIndent()
        val formattedCode =
            """
            sealed class Hello

            """.trimIndent()
        noConsecutiveBlankLinesRuleAssertThat(code)
            .hasLintViolation(2, 1, "Needless blank line(s)")
            .isFormattedAs(formattedCode)
    }

    @Test
    fun `Given class without body and consecutive blank lines at end of file then do return lint error`() {
        val code =
            """
            class Hello



            """.trimIndent()
        val formattedCode =
            """
            class Hello

            """.trimIndent()
        noConsecutiveBlankLinesRuleAssertThat(code)
            .hasLintViolation(2, 1, "Needless blank line(s)")
            .isFormattedAs(formattedCode)
    }

    @Test
    fun `Given data class without body and consecutive blank lines at end of file then do return lint error`() {
        val code =
            """
            data class Hello(val name: String)



            """.trimIndent()
        val formattedCode =
            """
            data class Hello(val name: String)

            """.trimIndent()
        noConsecutiveBlankLinesRuleAssertThat(code)
            .hasLintViolation(2, 1, "Needless blank line(s)")
            .isFormattedAs(formattedCode)
    }
}
"}
